ocr.text: In the context of Wipro's Professional & Business Services, the analysis of utilization rates by practice and project margin
provides crucial insights into operational efficiency and profitability across various sectors. The data reveals that the Marketing
practice exhibits a utilization rate of 75%, with an impressive margin of 90% contributing to a revenue of £12M. Additionally,
the Finance sector showcases a utilization rate of 80%, generating a substantial revenue of £110K. Notably, the Human
Resources practice, with a revenue of £15M, demonstrates a strong margin of 70% alongside a utilization rate of 85%. This
indicates effective resource deployment within the practice.
PracticeArea  UtilizationRate
RevenueperEmployee  ClientSatisfaction
KeyMetrics  PerformanceIndices
ConsultingServices  ITServices  SupportServices  TotalRevenue  AverageRate
Marketing  75%  £90K  85%  £12M  15%  Finance  80%  £110K
£15M  [HIDDEN]  HumanResources  [HIDDEN]  £80K  75%  £10M  25%  LegalServices
In contrast, the Legal Services practice, also reporting a revenue of £15M, has a lower utilization rate of 75%, reflecting a
margin of only 20%. Understanding these metrics is essential for strategic decision-making, allowing Wipro to identify areas for
improvement and optimize resource allocation. For instance, Project A within the Finance sector achieved units sold of 150,
with a cost of £500,000, providing a clear picture of project performance.
ProjectMarginAnalysis  UnitsSold  TotalRevenue  Costs
ProjectName  ClientName  UnitsSold  Revenue(GBP)  Cost(GBP)  Margin(%)  Headcount  ProjectDuration(months)
ProjectA  ClientX  [HIDDEN]  £750,000  [HIDDEN]  33.33%  10  12
ProjectB  ClientY  200  [HIDDEN]  £600,000  40.00%  15  10
ProjectC  ClientZ  100  £500,000  £350,000  30.00%  8  [HIDDEN]
Furthermore, insights from Project B, which generated a revenue of £1,000,000, and Project C, with a duration of 6 months,
further enrich the analysis, highlighting the importance of continuous monitoring for enhanced profitability across practices.
